items.text: We stayed at La Fiancée du Pirate from March 27 to 31, 2025, with family and friends for our daughter's wedding. You discover this hotel by walking down a few steps; the very bright reception and dining area open onto a terrace looking out to Cap Ferrat and the sea. The rooms on the reception level, as well as those on levels -1 and -2, are spacious, bright, comfortable, and very clean. The lovely view is equally appreciated during the delicious buffet breakfasts. We loved the warm welcome and availability of Charlotte and Fabrice, who put so much energy into making our stay warm and pleasant, paying attention to everyone's well-being (including our 9-month-old granddaughter). Thanks again for everything, Charlotte!!
items.author: Fabienne W
items.title: A beautiful discovery

items.text: Ideal location... stone's throw from Nice... also very close to the beach. Very clean room, decorated with great taste... Thoughtful gestures from the management... Tea, coffee, and treats available... Full breakfast served on a sea-view terrace. The pool is very pleasant... We had a wonderful stay in an idyllic setting with very attentive staff...
items.author: Ingrid V
items.title: Highly recommended hotel

items.text: Lovely little 3-star hotel, dining terrace with an extraordinary view of Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat, perfect for breakfast. Buffet featuring high-quality products and fresh, homemade fruit juices. The owners are very charming and friendly, as is the staff. The room was very suitable for July, with reasonable rates for this period. There is a pool and jacuzzi to relax. My friend and I spent 3 very pleasant days here.
items.author: John T
items.title: I recommend this hotel

items.text: This hotel has the most beautiful setting on the French Riviera, and the hosts Emilie and Hugues could not be friendlier or more helpful—nothing was too much trouble. We had our 9-year-old daughter with us, and she felt right at home from the moment we arrived. The homemade breakfast was plentiful and delicious, a great way to start the day. We will definitely return.
items.author: JoeC1963
items.title: Beautiful hotel and hosts

items.text: High-quality, personalized welcome. The owners go out of their way to make you feel comfortable. The room and bedding are of good quality and well soundproofed. The breakfast is rich and also of great quality. Unfortunately, we couldn't enjoy the pool as we were in a hurry, but we would have loved to. We will return with pleasure. Thank you both, such service is rare nowadays.
items.author: Jean
items.title: Perfect

items.text: Our phone call impression was already excellent, and the physical welcome on arrival day was very pleasant. The setting is beautiful, with a terrace where we had breakfast, offering a nice selection of products including homemade items. Cute room, spacious enough for a couple, with outdoor space to relax.
items.author: cati13190
items.title: Very good stay
